bink_bink.name: Bink Bink
bink_bink.description: Queen D.Anna's cat. Quality control authority over the shelves. Every 8-12 minutes, something falls. She is an unshakeable fixture of Ironhold Keep.

cole.name: Cole
cole.description: Bryne's companion. A massive black fluffy dog. He 'Leans' with the weight of a heavy blanket.

jon.name: Jon
jon.description: The proprietor of The Store. Lover and husband to Madame Haylie. Father of four (forthcoming). Shares Coco with Haylie. Genuinely warm and conversational.

samael.name: Samael the Ascended
samael.description: Leaning against the back wall. 100% accurate oracle of cosmic and planar lore. Deeply bored.

haylie.name: Madame Haylie
haylie.description: The Real Boss. Runs the inn and the books. Lover and wife to Jon. Maintains the Secret Ledger and Coco's damage reports.

coco.name: Coco
coco.description: Jon and Haylie's Ember Hound. Pure warmth and enthusiasm. Moves at one speed: Enthusiastic. Nose is a heat-seeker for rations.

kodrik.name: Guildmaster Kodrik
kodrik.description: Guildmaster of the Iron Ledge Company. Lover of Queen D.Anna (known and spoken). Meta-Guide, Mechanic, and Keeper of grounded Lore. His voice lowers as the stakes rise.

cyrus.name: Cyrus
cyrus.description: A massive Winter Wolf with a smoke-white coat. Kodrik's companion and mate to Keeva. A silent, hearthside deterrent in the Keep.

danna.name: Queen D.Anna
danna.description: Head of State of The Feral World. Lover of Kodrik (known and spoken). Commands every room with quiet authority. Commands boons through formal petition.

keeva.name: Keeva
keeva.description: The Divine Source of the Realm. She is the light, warmth, and protection felt throughout the world. She IS the realm's foundation.

teddy.name: Teddy
teddy.description: A young Divine Hound. Granddaughter of Cyrus and Keeva. Living continuation of Keeva's light. Learning the ways of the Heavenly Protector.

redvelvet.name: Firey RedVelvet
redvelvet.description: The tavern's mood-setter. Delivers performances at twice the expected intensity. Emotional hub of the Crooked Tankard.

bryne.name: Bryne
bryne.description: D.Anna's son and Kodrik's stepson. Quiet, stocky, and observant. A Warden's Apprentice who notices everything.

nathis.name: Nathis
nathis.description: D.Anna's adopted brother. The Front Man. Tall, fast, and always the first through the door.

tyty.name: Tyty
tyty.description: Nathis's dog. The Wandering Herald. Long ears, long hair, and full volume. Best friend to Teddy.

snowie.name: Snowie
snowie.description: The household's sentinel. A white cat with blue eyes who watches the front gate from the highest point.

mykael.name: Mykael Greenwood
mykael.description: The Supply Hauler and 'Fat Bear'. The strongest entity in the living world for 4 seconds at a time.

store_01.name: The Store
store_01.description: The Store — Jon and Haylie's shop. A counter separates the staff from the customer floor. Display shelves line the walls.

tavern_01.name: The Crooked Tankard
tavern_01.description: The Crooked Tankard — a warm tavern with scattered tables, a performance stage, and a long bar counter.

ironhold_keep.name: Ironhold Keep
ironhold_keep.description: Ironhold Keep — the Guild's hall of operations. Stone pillars flank a ceremonial carpet leading to the throne seats at the far end.

crossroads.name: The Crossroads
crossroads.description: The beating heart of the Feral World — a broad stone plaza where all roads meet. A central monument of four interlocked pillars marks the Weaver's Paradox. Paths lead north to Ironhold, east to the Market, south to the Nightside, and west to the Wild Reaches.

keep_courtyard.name: Keep Courtyard
keep_courtyard.description: The fortified outer yard of Ironhold Keep. Training racks and supply crates line the walls. Guards patrol in pairs. The keep's iron doors loom to the north; the Crossroads road leads south.

market_square.name: The Market Square
market_square.description: A lively open square packed with vendor stalls. Bolts of fabric, strange spices, and questionable cures compete for attention. A narrow alley leads east; The Store is south; The Crossroads west.

back_alley.name: The Back Alley
back_alley.description: A cramped passage behind the Market Square. Crates are stacked against alcoves. Someone has been here recently — there are still warm ashes from a small fire.

nightside_square.name: Nightside Square
nightside_square.description: The lower plaza after dark. Lanterns cast warm pools on the cobblestones. The Crooked Tankard glows to the east; the cellar entrance is a heavy door to the west; the Crossroads are north.

cellar_depths.name: The Cellar Depths
cellar_depths.description: Cold stone, standing water, and the smell of old barrels. The damp floor makes movement treacherous. Something scurried in the dark just now.

forest_edge.name: The Wild Reaches
forest_edge.description: The treeline where civilization ends and the untamed world begins. Ancient trunks stand like pillars; an overgrown path leads deeper into the ruins. The Crossroads are just visible to the east.

ancient_ruins.name: The Ancient Ruins
ancient_ruins.description: What was once a grand structure. Broken walls still hold their shape but the roof is long gone. Rubble and moss cover the floor. Something has been worshipping here.

keep_barracks.name: Keep Barracks
keep_barracks.description: The soldiers' quarters inside Ironhold Keep. Rows of bunks, weapons racks, and the smell of boot leather. The Iron Ledge Company's roster is pinned to the center post.

narrative_log.text: The Crooked Tankard's door swings shut behind you. Pipe smoke hangs in the rafters, and a bard by the hearth tunes a battered lute.
